title: Hexatone's manual is now on the web
body: The full Hexatone manual is now a page on the site, with a downloadable PDF — covering tunings, the built-in sampler, isomorphic layouts, and MPE. The free in-browser **SFZ Builder** turns a folder of samples into an instrument too.

title: Pond is out on the App Store
body: Pond — a ripple sequencer for iPad — is available now. Drop a stone in the water and let the wave play the notes: tap to send ripples, plant emitters, and watch real wave interference shape the dynamics.

title: Anima — a wind synth on the way
body: Work has begun on **Anima**, a physical-modeling wind synthesizer for iPad and the companion to Hexatone. No oscillators — air resonating in a pipe — and microtonal to the core.
